Design Family Seniors

A flexible design system landing page focused on senior services and family care.

Role

Design & Front-end

Tools

  • Astro
  • CSS
  • Responsive Design

Overview

A flexible design system landing page focused on senior services and family care.

Problem

Create a polished page that feels welcoming for families and seniors.

Process

Develop a calm layout with strong typography and accessible spacing for older users.

Final Solution

A clean landing page with a warm visual palette and clear calls to action.

Images

Open live project

Reflection

This project demonstrates how interface tone and layout can build trust quickly.
